creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
Tcl/Tk plus patch is a patch set which has:
   100% upper compatible
   many bug fix
   and many enhancements.
So I think it is a good idea that include it.

Fix: Please apply following patchs.
Sorry, they are diff file from current 8.2.0.

Following one is for lang/tcl82.
BEGIN>---8<CUT HERE>8---
END>---8<CUT HERE>8---

And Following one is for x11-toolkits/tk82
BEGIN>---8<CUT HERE>8---


END>---8<CUT HERE>8------JNbmIwTSOLPTUIjP0OIuJhjLCttyysTFZTeOlQURIMQjGg6l
